channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigeria Super Eagles adopt cautious approach ahead of Unity Cup final against Jamaica in London
item.description: The Super Eagles of Nigeria are going into Saturday’s 2026 Unity Cup final against Jamaica with a lot of caution, as dem no wan take anything for granted despite their strong run so far in the tournam...

item.title: Joan Cusack returns to the red carpet for the London premiere of Toy Story 5
item.description: Joan Cusack, the acclaimed American actress, made her first red carpet appearance in 11 years at the London premiere of Toy Story 5. Now 63, Cusack looked effortlessly elegant in a white button-up shi...

item.title: Analysis of xenophobia and its socio-economic and policy implications in South Africa
item.description: The opinion piece examines the rising tensions and xenophobic violence against foreign African nationals in South Africa and argues that these developments carry significant political, economic, and d...

item.title: Questions intensify around Ramaphosa’s Phala Phala farm scandal amid legal and political challenges
item.description: This opinion piece examines the ongoing controversy surrounding President Cyril Ramaphosa’s Phala Phala farm scandal, framing it as a matter that continues to raise political and legal questions in So...

item.title: U.S. and Iran reach tentative 60-day ceasefire deal awaiting presidential approval
item.description: The United States and Iran have reportedly reached a tentative agreement to extend their current ceasefire by 60 days, while also initiating discussions on Iran’s nuclear programme. According to U.S. ...

item.title: Wildfire in Barrhead County prompts evacuation orders for Summerlea and Thunder Lake subdivisions
item.description: A wildfire burning in Barrhead County, located northwest of Edmonton, Alberta, prompted authorities to issue evacuation orders for parts of the municipality on Thursday afternoon. The fire led to a de...

item.title: Blue Bombers rest veterans and evaluate young talent in final pre-season matchup against BC Lions
item.description: The Winnipeg Blue Bombers are using their final pre-season game as an opportunity to evaluate younger and less experienced players rather than relying on their established starters. In Friday’s exhibi...

item.title: Nicolas Cage credits Breaking Bad with changing his view on television roles
item.description: Nicolas Cage has revealed that his long-standing reluctance to appear in television productions changed after he watched the acclaimed series Breaking Bad during lockdown. Speaking in an interview wit...

item.title: How Social Media Influencers Are Shaping Kenya’s Political Discourse Ahead of 2027
item.description: The article examines how political influence in Kenya has shifted from vernacular radio stations to social media influencers, bloggers, and online content creators. It draws parallels between the role...

item.title: How Infrastructure Vandalism Is Undermining Nigeria’s Power Sector and Economy
item.description: The article examines the growing problem of infrastructure vandalism in Nigeria’s electricity sector and how it is seriously affecting national development. It explains that acts such as stealing elec...

item.title: Ogun State celebrates Governor Dapo Abiodun at 66, highlighting governance achievements and development strides
item.description: The article marks the 66th birthday of Ogun State Governor, Dapo Abiodun, celebrating his leadership and contributions to the state’s development. It presents him as a resilient and visionary leader w...

item.title: Philippines and Japan begin talks on military intelligence-sharing pact (GSOMIA) amid regional tensions
item.description: The Philippines and Japan have officially announced the start of negotiations for a General Security of Military Information Agreement (GSOMIA), a key step that would allow both countries to share def...

item.title: PSG aims for consecutive Champions League titles under Luis Enrique
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) is poised to make history once again in the UEFA Champions League, with the final scheduled in Budapest against Arsenal. Under the guidance of coach Luis Enrique, PSG has tra...

item.title: ‘X-Men ’97 Season 2’ trailer highlights Apocalypse as central threat
item.description: The article from ABS-CBN Entertainment reports on the release of the trailer for the upcoming ‘X-Men ’97 Season 2’, which continues the revival of the classic animated Marvel series. The teaser places...

item.title: Concert economy expected to drive growth in India’s audio-visual, lighting and live entertainment industry
item.description: Industry experts have highlighted that India’s rapidly growing “concert economy” is becoming a major driver of expansion in the professional audio, audio-visual (AV), lighting, and live entertainment ...

item.title: NASA Outlines Phased Plan to Establish a Lunar Base at the Moon’s South Pole
item.description: NASA has unveiled a detailed plan to build a permanent lunar base at the Moon's south pole, prioritizing surface operations over the previously planned Gateway orbital station. The project will be exe...

item.title: US agencies expand monitoring of emerging ‘anti-tech extremism’ amid growing AI-related tensions
item.description: According to documents obtained by WIRED, US federal and local law enforcement agencies are increasingly focusing on what they describe as a rising category of domestic threat referred to as “anti-tec...

item.title: SARB raises interest rates, pushing up household debt repayments
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank (SARB) has increased the repurchase rate by 25 basis points to 10.50%, signalling that interest rates are likely to remain high for an extended period. This hike comes a...

item.title: Government considers IAF support for secure transport of NEET-UG retest papers
item.description: The Centre is reportedly exploring the use of Indian Air Force (IAF) aircraft to transport question papers for the NEET-UG retest scheduled on June 21, as part of enhanced security measures following ...

item.title: Netflix reports strong Australian revenue growth while sending most earnings to overseas parent companies
item.description: Netflix generated $1.47 billion in revenue in Australia during 2025, reflecting the continuing growth of subscription streaming services among Australian consumers. According to the report, the compan...
